name: Coco Chanel
famous_for: Fashion designer. Founder of the Chanel fashion house

name: Marie Curie
famous_for: Pioneering research on radioactivity. First person to win two Nobel Prizes

name: Mahatma Gandhi
famous_for: Leader of India's nonviolent independence movement

name: Steve Jobs
famous_for: Co-founder of Apple Inc. and pioneer of personal computing

name: Nelson Mandela
famous_for: Anti-apartheid revolutionary and first Black President of South Africa

name: John F. Kennedy
famous_for: 35th President of the United States. Had a Moon landing vision

name: Henry Ford
famous_for: Founder of Ford Motor Company. Assembly line manufacturing

name: Eleanor Roosevelt
famous_for: Former First Lady. Human rights advocate and diplomat

name: Elon Musk
famous_for: CEO of Tesla and SpaceX. Entrepreneur

name: Malala Yousafzai
famous_for: Education activist and youngest Nobel Peace Prize laureate

name: Ursula Burns
famous_for: Former CEO of Xerox. First Black woman to lead a Fortune 500 company

name: Reshma Saujani
famous_for: Founder of Girls Who Code and advocate for women in technology

name: Albert Einstein
famous_for: Theoretical physicist. Developed the theory of relativity
